meta.notes: Hybrid approach: CSS/HTML extraction for colors (SVG fills, inline styles, gradients), typography (Google Fonts), social channels (Instagram/LinkedIn/Facebook/YouTube/X/TikTok handles), and logo (inline SVG from header). Claude Haiku handles semantic fields: name, industry, tagline, mission, values, personas. SETUP: Open '⚙️ Config' node and replace 'sk-ant-PASTE-YOUR-KEY-HERE' with your Anthropic API key. Cost: ~$0.001 per scrape.
